title: Successful account creation with valid email and password
description: Verify that a user can create an account using a unique email and a password meeting all complexity rules, and receive a success confirmation.

title: Registration with duplicate email is rejected
description: Verify that the system rejects registration when the email already exists and displays a meaningful inline error message.

title: Registration with invalid email format missing '@'
description: Verify that the system rejects an email address without '@' and shows an appropriate error.

title: Registration with invalid email format missing domain
description: Verify that the system rejects an email address without a domain part after '@' and shows an appropriate error.

title: Password length boundary at 7 characters is rejected
description: Verify that a password of exactly 7 characters is rejected as below the minimum length of 8.

title: Password length boundary at 8 characters is accepted
description: Verify that a password of exactly 8 characters meeting all complexity rules is accepted.

title: Password length boundary at 12 characters is accepted
description: Verify that a password of exactly 12 characters meeting all complexity rules is accepted.

title: Password length boundary at 13 characters is rejected
description: Verify that a password of exactly 13 characters is rejected as exceeding the maximum length of 12.

title: Password missing uppercase letter is rejected
description: Verify that a password without an uppercase letter is rejected due to BR003.

title: Password missing lowercase letter is rejected
description: Verify that a password without a lowercase letter is rejected due to BR003.

title: Password missing digit is rejected
description: Verify that a password without a numeric digit is rejected due to BR003.

title: Password missing special character is rejected
description: Verify that a password without a special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *) is rejected due to BR003.

title: Password with consecutive spaces is rejected
description: Verify that a password containing two or more consecutive spaces is rejected due to BR004.

title: Password containing email prefix is rejected
description: Verify that a password containing the email prefix (part before '@') is rejected due to BR005.

title: Password containing username is rejected
description: Verify that a password containing the username (if separate from email) is rejected due to BR005.

title: Verification email sent immediately after registration
description: Verify that a unique verification link is sent via email to the registered email address immediately after successful account creation.

title: Login blocked for unverified account
description: Verify that a user cannot log in before verifying their email address.

title: Login allowed after successful email verification
description: Verify that a user can log in after clicking the verification link in the email.

title: Verification link expires after 24 hours
description: Verify that an expired verification link (older than 24 hours) is rejected and the user cannot verify their email using it.

title: Resend verification link after 60 seconds is allowed
description: Verify that a user can request a resend of the verification link after waiting 60 seconds from the previous request.

title: Resend verification link before 60 seconds is blocked
description: Verify that a resend request made before 60 seconds have elapsed is rejected.

title: Resend timing boundary at 59 seconds is blocked
description: Verify that a resend request at exactly 59 seconds after the previous request is rejected.

title: Resend timing boundary at 60 seconds is allowed
description: Verify that a resend request at exactly 60 seconds after the previous request is accepted.

title: Resend timing boundary at 61 seconds is allowed
description: Verify that a resend request at exactly 61 seconds after the previous request is accepted.

title: Duplicate email inline error message is displayed
description: Verify that when a user tries to register with an already existing email, a meaningful inline error message appears near the email field.

title: External email delivery service failure during verification email send
description: Verify that the system handles a failure of the external email delivery service gracefully, e.g., by showing an error message to the user and not creating an incomplete account.

title: Delayed email delivery from external service
description: Verify that the system remains functional and the user can still verify their email when the external delivery service has a delay (e.g., email arrives after 10 minutes).

title: Server error during account creation is handled gracefully
description: Verify that if a server error (e.g., HTTP 500) occurs during account creation, the system shows a user-friendly error message and does not create a partial account.

title: Email uniqueness check is case-insensitive
description: Verify that registering with 'Test@example.com' is rejected if 'test@example.com' already exists, enforcing email uniqueness case-insensitively.

title: Verification link tampering is rejected
description: Verify that modifying the verification link (e.g., changing token or user ID) results in an error and does not verify a different account.

title: Reuse of a used verification link is rejected
description: Verify that after a successful email verification, clicking the same verification link again shows an error or indicates the account is already verified.

title: SQL injection attempt in email field is rejected
description: Verify that entering a SQL injection payload in the email field does not cause a database error or bypass validation.

title: XSS attempt in email field is rejected
description: Verify that entering a script tag in the email field is rejected or properly escaped and does not execute.

title: SQL injection attempt in password field is rejected
description: Verify that entering a SQL injection payload in the password field does not cause a database error or bypass validation.

title: XSS attempt in password field is rejected
description: Verify that entering a script tag in the password field is rejected or properly escaped and does not execute.

title: Rate limiting on resend requests prevents abuse
description: Verify that the system enforces the 60-second cooldown on resend requests and does not allow multiple rapid requests.

title: Success message displayed after account creation
description: Verify that a success message is displayed to the user after a successful account creation.

title: Success message displayed after email verification
description: Verify that a success message is displayed to the user after a successful email verification.

title: Loading state shown during email sending
description: Verify that a loading indicator is shown while the system is sending the verification email.

title: Loading state shown during resend request
description: Verify that a loading indicator is shown while the system processes a resend request.
